title: Iridium Network Modpack
description: The ever changing custom modpack for the iridium minecraft network
body: This is a modpack made for the purpose of being used on the Iridium Network's modded server, released on modrinth so players can more easily update their packs without downloading new zips directly from me. The only intended audience for this modpack are the players on that server, and the mods and Minecraft version will change often when the pack gets redone for a fresh restart.
